question:
①When the long-haired skateboarder passes a closed shop with a pure red awning, he performs an action (Action A).
②When he performs Action A for the next time, what object is on his right side?

①Locate the skateboarder wearing a black top and black pants.
②When he performs a trick for the first time, the object closest to him on his right hand side is Object A. What is Object A?

①After the long-haired skateboarder passes the first intersection, there are several shop signs on his right hand side with a main color matching his shoes.
②What is the name of the second such shop he encounters?

①When the cameraman overtakes the long-haired skateboarder for the first time, the athlete points to a shop (Shop A).
②The shop diagonally across the intersection from Shop A is Shop B.
③Since Shop B is on the corner, it has two faces. One white English letter on one of the faces is almost missing. What is this letter?

①When the long-haired skateboarder is overtaken by two motorcycles, the color of the car he is facing is Color A.
②What is the color of the license plate of the first car with main Color A that he passes?

The long-haired skateboarder passes a 7-Eleven and a Burger King.
①The 7-Eleven is in Direction A relative to the Burger King.
②When the skateboarder performs his second trick, there is a shop (Shop B) in Direction A relative to the athlete. What is the main color of Shop B's storefront?

①When the long-haired skateboarder gets off his board and walks for the first time, a couple approaches the camera. The man's shirt and pants color combination is A.
②A lady had previously walked past the skateboarder on his right side. Her shirt and pants color combination was exactly the inverse of A.
③When she passed shoulder-to-shoulder with the athlete, what was the name of the nearest shop to her?

①When the long-haired skateboarder has his left foot on the front of the board for the first time, the main color of the shop on his right is Color A.
②What is the name of the first shop with main Color A that the athlete encounters on the right side of the road?
When the long-haired skateboarder passes an NYPD car for the second time, what is the name of the shop located in the direction of his front-right?
Between the first intersection and the second intersection, how many times did the skateboard flip totally?

①Identify the road facility (Facility A) in the intersection where the long-haired skateboarder performed multiple tricks.
②Locate the tallest building visible in the diagonal direction from Facility A. What is the color of the top of this building?

The long-haired skateboarder gets stuck on top of a stone pier at the second intersection, then steps down and stands the board up with one hand. If his initial skating direction was the 'Nose' (board front), is he currently holding the Nose or the Tail?
After the long-haired skateboarder crosses the intersection, how does he skate on the sidewalk?
answer_choice_2: Half the time lifting rear wheels

question: At the end of the video: ①The long-haired skateboarder shakes hands with someone. ②The other person is holding an item (Item A) in their other hand. What is Item A?
From the moment the long-haired skateboarder jumps over a relatively high flower bed until he takes a photo with a boy, how many times did he make a mistake?

After the long-haired skateboarder takes a photo with the boy, there are some rectangular stone benches. How many benches satisfy these conditions: ①No one is sitting on it, and ②The athlete did not jump/fly onto it?

When the long-haired skateboarder enters the road from a crosswalk: ①He performs a tail-slide to the right and grazes a metal pole. ②There are many metal poles here, but spatially, only a subset allows the athlete to: (i) Exit from the same opening, and (ii) Safely graze the pole. How many poles satisfy these requirements?

When the long-haired skateboarder stands the board vertically on its side for the first time in the video: ①If the athlete's right-hand direction is North. ②Then, what was his skating direction when he first attempted a trick on the rectangular stone bench?

①If the orientation when the long-haired skateboarder first jumps onto the rectangular stone bench is North. ②What is his orientation on the stone bench during the final successful attempt where he doesn't fall off?

During the attempts to jump a series of stairs sets: ①On one attempt, there is a brightly colored cone on the stairs. ②After completing this jump, next to the landing platform, there is a large poster where the clothes are embellished with many graphics of Shape A. ③When the skateboarder encounters clothes/posters embellished with Shape A again later, how many connected shapes identical to A are under his feet?
When the long-haired skateboarder attempts to jump a series of stairs sets consecutively, he uses a different trick for each jump. What is the maximum number of times he used the exact same trick?

①Near the end of the video, an H&M store is visible. ②In the first half of the video, at the moment the long-haired skateboarder stands on a rectangular stone bench holding his board vertically, what is the position of that H&M store relative to him?

During the attempts to jump a series of stairs sets: ①He falls once, falling in Direction A. ②When the skateboarder first skates in Direction A, a lady passes in front of the camera. What color are her shoes?

During the attempts to jump a series of stairs sets, he uses different tricks. ①When he first uses any form of board rotation to fly up the stairs, ②there is a wall on the side of the platform between that set and the next set, covered with many small repeating graphics. What is this graphic?

Locate the moment the runner in grey clothes takes off his shirt. ①After taking off his shirt, they walk into a straight road. If their direction of travel at this moment is North, ②what was their direction of travel most nearly on the bridge at the beginning of the video?

Locate the parkour runner wearing a white top and long pants. ①From the beginning of the recording until the first time he spins while holding onto a rack/rail, ②what is his net number of turns to the left?

Locate the runner in grey clothes after he performs a move along a low wall. ①The four of them successively hang on different bars. ②When dismounting, they all do a flip. Who flips in the same direction as the grey-clothed runner did initially?
answer_choice_1: The runner in white top and long pants
answer_choice_4: The runner in shorts and the runner in yellow

question: ①Locate where runner A completes a backflip assisted by another runner. ②Locate where the four runners successively jump down a significant height at the end. Which position in the sequence is A when jumping down?

①Locate a moment where three runners successively perform the same action; label this location A. ②Locate the first time two runners simultaneously perform the same action side-by-side; label this location B. Which location is higher in elevation, A or B?

①Locate the scene where the four runners successively jump down a significant height; one runner (Runner A) is assisted down by other runners. ②Then locate the moment where three runners successively perform the same action. Which position in the sequence is A when performing this action?
answer_choice_3: A is not among the three

question: Locate the runner in grey clothes after he performs a move along a low wall. ①The four of them successively hang on different bars. ②They all do a flip when dismounting; remember their flip directions. ③Immediately after, three of them perform another flip at a same location. Who flips in roughly the same direction as they did in the previous step?
answer_choice_4: The runner in white top and long pants
answer: The runner in white top and long pants

question: ①Locate the first time two runners simultaneously perform the same action side-by-side; assume their direction is Due North. ②Locate the second time two runners simultaneously perform the same action side-by-side. What is their direction of travel closest to at this second moment?
Locate the parkour runner wearing a white top and long pants. ①Remember the first action he performs. ②When this action appears next, who performs it?
answer_choice_1: The runner in white top and long pants

question: ①Locate a scene where only one runner completes a high-difficulty move on a specific terrain, while another runner (A) films him with a phone. ②Locate the moment where three runners successively perform the same action. Which position in the sequence is A?
answer_choice_3: A is not among the three

question: Locate the interview taking place when the drone moves from indoors to outdoors for the first time. ①At this moment, the camera is facing Direction A. ②In Direction A, there is a field where training is happening. Locate a coach on this field who is holding a whistle in his mouth. What color is this coach's shirt?

①Locate a person who satisfies: 1. Head is wrapped/covered, 2. Sitting against a cabinet, 3. The cabinet behind has many grid squares. If this person is facing Due North, ②what is the direction of the main building gate (facing outward)?

①Locate the person without a hat sitting on the sofa in the lobby just after entering the building. The direction they are facing is A. ②Locate the first person (B) the drone encounters who is facing the opposite direction of A. What color is B's shirt?

①Locate the lady sewing clothes; the number on the clothes she is sewing is A. ②Locate a jersey with the name WARD in the same room; its number is B. ③Locate the player on the outdoor field whose legs the drone flies through; this player's number is C. Calculate C - B - A = ?
①Locate an electronic screen displaying 10:10. If this screen faces North, ②what is the orientation of the man who is shaking the storage lockers?

①Locate the moment the drone sees the two mascots for the last time; let their position when they disappear from view be Position A. ②Locate a person kicking a field goal on the outdoor field. In which direction is Position A relative to this person?

①Locate the team's large locker room. ②The drone passes through this locker room twice. This involves passing through a door (entry or exit) four times total. How many of these four door events involve the exact same door?
①Locate the man pointing at a television in the locker room. ②In what direction is the outdoor field relative to him?

①Locate the moment the drone sees the two mascots for the last time; let their position when they disappear from view be Position A. ②Locate the player on the outdoor field whose legs the drone flies through. When passing through, in which direction is Position A relative to this player?

①Locate the helmet sign outside the building; remember its color (Color A). ②The first person encountered with a shirt of Color A has a hat of Color B. ③What is the shirt color of the first person encountered whose shoes are visible and of Color B?
①Locate a person who satisfies: 1. Head is wrapped/covered, 2. Sitting against a cabinet, 3. The cabinet behind has many grid squares. ②In what direction is the outdoor field relative to this person?
The drone sees the two mascots multiple times during the tour. During which encounter does the drone follow the two mascots for the longest duration?
①Locate the lady who is sewing clothes with a sewing machine. ②What is directly behind the wall she is facing?

①Locate the indoor football field. ②Note that the drone crosses the walls of this field (entering or leaving) three times. In chronological order, let the openings be A, B, and C. Order these openings by size from largest to smallest.

①Locate the high platform where the drum kit is on the performance stage; its shape is A. ②Locate a poster indoors that has a graphic of Shape A in the corner; this poster's location is B. ③Locate the group of ticket staff wearing blue clothes. In what direction is B relative to them?

Locate the group running from outside towards the indoor venue. ①Just before entering, they pass a type of trash can (Type A). ②Later, when the drone is about to enter the performance area, it encounters a row of trash cans. Which position in that row corresponds to a trash can of Type A?
Locate the group running from outside towards the indoor venue at the start. ①If they are running North, ②what is the direction the drummer beneath the high stage platform is facing?

Locate the group running from outside towards the indoor venue. ①If they are running North. ②Identify three positions: Before the drone enters the dark stage, the furthest North, West, and East points it reaches are A, B, and C respectively. Order A, B, and C by height from lowest to highest.
①Locate the group of ticket staff wearing blue clothes indoors. ②In what direction is the performance stage relative to them?
①Locate the box storing the drone; its opening faces North. ②If the box location is A, and the drone's final crash location is B, roughly where is B relative to A?
①Locate the box storing the drone; assume its opening faces North. ②Locate a pile of gift boxes; a car knocks them over and drives in Direction B. What is Direction B?
①Note a cut in the video featuring many balloons in the sky as a transition. ②What car action is performed after the transition that was not performed before it?
answer_choice_3: Switching from reverse to forward driving
answer: Switching from reverse to forward driving

question: ①Locate House A (Corner house where the red car turns; when House A appears, a white van is behind the red car). ②Locate the blue box in the middle of the road. ③Locate the box storing the drone; its opening faces North. In what direction is the blue box relative to House A?

①Locate the box storing the drone; assume its opening faces North. ②Locate two girls in black clothes standing in an open area next to a road. When the car arrives at this spot again, from which direction does it come?
①Locate the two girls in black clothes standing in an open area. How many degrees did the car rotate around them?
①Locate a blue box in the middle of the road. ②The car knocks it over, spilling colorful contents. ③How many degrees did the car rotate at this box (from hitting it to driving away)?
①Locate the box storing the drone; assume its opening faces North. ②After the car spins around the two black-clothed girls, it drives in Direction B. What is Direction B?

①Locate a blue box in the middle of the road. ②The car knocks it over, spilling colorful contents. ③The last steering action the car made before hitting the box was Action A. ④What was the first steering action the car made after completing Action A?

①Locate the moment the drone first enters the building; two ladies are walking side-by-side. The curly-haired lady's pants color is A. ②Locate another person (B) wearing pants of the same color A inside the cylindrical space before entering the main building. What color are B's shoes?
①Locate a glass wall on the 3rd floor covered with many colorful sticky notes. ②What is the hairstyle of the office worker in front of this wall?

①Locate the moment at the end of the video when the drone enters the black and white box. Assume the drone is flying Due North at this moment. ②The drone had previously flown out of this box. What was its flight direction when it exited?

①Assume the drone's direction on the 3rd floor of the manufacturing area is Due East. ②Locate the segment where the drone tracks the movement of a machine tool with various working parts on both sides. In what direction is this movement?
Locate an office worker who satisfies: ①Is on the 3rd floor. ②The monitor in front of them is black/off. ③Is having a meeting using their laptop. What is the color of the water cup on their desk?
①The drone records spaces mainly divided into office areas and manufacturing areas. ②How many degrees does the drone rotate when transitioning from the office area to the manufacturing area?

①Locate the bridges with people walking on them on both the 3rd and 2nd floor heights inside the building. ②If the person on the 3rd-floor bridge is walking East, what is the closest direction the person on the 2nd-floor bridge is walking?
①Locate the moment the drone flies through a person's legs; note the color of this person's pants. ②In the group of people directly above this person, how many have pants of the same color?

①Locate the car with a drone on its roof that appears shortly after the video starts. ②Locate the moment the camera sees that drone for the second time. ③Just before this moment, there is a number on the wall. What is this number?

①Note the shape of the building part when the drone first enters. ②Later, on the 3rd floor, the drone encounters a similarly shaped space. ③In this space, how many people are to the left of the person raising their hand highest?
①Among the many musicians in the church: ②Locate the piano player and the violin player. In what direction is the violin player relative to the piano player?

①Locate two huge letters 'A' in the church. ②Between the two 'A's is an object with Shape B. ③Find an instrument with a shape similar to B, played by Person C. ④Person C's pants color is D. How many other musicians in the church have pants clearly visible as Color D?

①Locate the elevator the drone passes inside the building. ②Shortly after passing the elevator, the drone enters a corridor with six square male avatar portraits side-by-side on one side. ③What is most likely behind the wall with these portraits?
answer_choice_2: A conference room with a projector

question: ①Locate the group performing in the center of the stage (Group A); they are facing Direction B. ②Among all the people the drone encounters after passing the stage, find the girl also facing Direction B. What color is her top?
①Locate Group A performing in the center of the stage. ②Locate Person B wearing a grey T-shirt and red earmuffs using a saw. In what direction is Group A relative to Person B?
①Locate the statue (A) near the entrance of the building. ②Locate the miniature sailboat model (B) on display. ③In what direction is B relative to A?

①Locate four students discussing in front of a classroom window; assume they are facing Due North. ②Locate the robotics club where people are operating a machine car. Locate the black student with the top of his head dyed white (Student B). What direction is B facing?
①Locate two girls throwing a frisbee on the lawn. If the girl in light-colored clothes throws the frisbee Due North: ②Locate a girl skateboarding. In what direction is she skating?

①Locate the library in the basement acting as a student activity room. ②The drone descends to the basement from Location A, and later ascends to the first floor from Location B. ③If you are a person at Location A just about to walk into the basement, in what direction is Location B relative to you?

①Locate a group of students playing ping pong on a homemade table. If the side that loses a point when the drone flies by is facing Due North: ②Locate a large blue clock hanging on the roof. What direction is this clock facing?

①Locate two shorter individuals walking side-by-side in the hallway. If they are facing Northwest: ②Locate two people sitting in front of a screen analyzing its content. What direction are they facing?

①If the drone's initial flight direction is Due North, locate the moment the drone faces Due South for the first time. ②What is the color of the shirt of the person closest to the drone at this moment?
